acceptance_criteria.given: tests/score-lifecycle-contract/test-lifecycle-cas.sh with the venv-activation fix applied at lines 151 and 194
acceptance_criteria.when: bash -n tests/score-lifecycle-contract/test-lifecycle-cas.sh is run (syntax check), then grep -c 'source.*venv.*activate.*&&.*python3' tests/score-lifecycle-contract/test-lifecycle-cas.sh is run to count venv-wrapped python3 invocations, then grep -cP '^python3' tests/score-lifecycle-contract/test-lifecycle-cas.sh is run to count bare python3 lines at line start
acceptance_criteria.then: syntax check exits 0; venv-wrapped grep count equals 3 (line 86 pre-existing + lines 151 and 194 after fix); bare-python3-at-line-start grep outputs '0' on stdout (grep exits 1 for zero count — expected)

acceptance_criteria.given: The fix is applied and the test harness dependencies (scripts/score-update.sh, scripts/score-inject.sh, scripts/lifecycle-baseline-import.sh) are present
acceptance_criteria.when: bash tests/score-lifecycle-contract/test-lifecycle-cas.sh is run from repo root
acceptance_criteria.then: script exits 0 (all CAS tests — a, b, c, d, e — pass)
